name: Irish Stew (1) [Ballymaloe]
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Lamb fat or beef dripping
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred some of the lamb fat and render it down in a heavy casserole.
2. Peel onions and potatoes, and scrape carrots.
3. Cut the meat into 8 pieces; only the excess fat is trimmed away.
4. Remove bones from the meat if present.
5. Cut the carrots and onions into quarters.
6. Toss the meat in the rendered fat until it changes color.
7. Repeat step 6 with the onions and carrots.
8. Add stock and season carefully.
9. Place whole potatoes on top of the stew.
10. Simmer gently until the meat is cooked, approximately 2 hours.
11. Carefully pour off the cooking liquid.
12. Degrease the remaining stew.
13. Reheat in another saucepan.
14. Check seasoning.
15. Swirl in butter, chives, and chopped parsley before pouring back over the stew.
